khilafat_posters_p003.translated_text:
﻿________________

Despair is a sin

The attempts to destroy the greatness and glory of the Islamic Caliphate are being thwarted. Fight these attempts in a fair manner and completely from the Messenger of Allah, and Allah is the Enlightener, and even though there are many disbelievers, the Light of Truth will not be understood by the soul! What should be done?
This question has been decided by the representatives of the Muslims of India at the conference in Dubai. And Mahatma Gandhi and other Hindu leaders have promised to support and endorse this decision. Statement Details
The armed forces of the Ottoman Empire and the Islamic State are not involved in the joy of Islam. The hostile intentions of England and its allies regarding the peace treaty are clear. (2) Do not participate in the meeting,
Do not participate in the peace treaty procession without dividing the country and the peace treaty. On Friday, 25th of Dir., express your feelings by holding a meeting everywhere and clearly state that the settlement of the Ottoman Empire and the Islamic State will be in our interest. Participation in the peace treaty is a sin for Muslims. Islamic scholars have given fatwas.
What has been done to the Muslims and now what are you doing? If the society is safe and sound, then God is also your supporter and helper!
The needy, please accept the President's request, remove the body from the coffin of the deceased. The deceased is lying in the coffin of the deceased. Jaipur, Professor and Aid are going to the cemetery, the association of the publication of the conflict celebration will be destroyed.
CS CamScanner
This is the end of the end.

khilafat_posters_p004.translated_text:
﻿________________

Mahatma Gandhi's ruling on Abdul Bari
Is it permissible for scholars and scholars to accept or reject the teachings of the English language?
Is there any Hindu, Salman, fairy, or monkey who is not a Hindu?
Is participation in the celebration of the festival forbidden?
Even if they celebrate, the caliphate will not be established. Rather, it is said that Islam has been reduced and burdened by them.
Who does not sell the water of the river at the time of the water crisis?
On November 24, Salman Benjamin, the caliphate of the self, did not accept the differences of any one person, but did not accept the tears of millions of hearts and three thousand people. The Ahmedabad and the speciality are low, the fifth place
The memory of the martyrs should not be forgotten in the Jain community. All the greatness of Islam and humanity should be paid in the barat
Needed by me
Dr. Ahmed Nar Ansari President
CS CamScanner

khilafat_posters_p005.translated_text:
﻿________________

Jauurosues
Mahatma Gandhi's order
Maulana Abdul Bari's fatwa
and
the decision of the Joint Conference of Hindus and Muslims
is that no Indian should celebrate the reconciliation that will be celebrated on December 13, 14, 15, and 16, 1916.
There is no reconciliation anywhere? Then why should we celebrate the reconciliation?
Is there reconciliation in Asia?
Persia, Egypt, Turkey—these are living proof of reconciliation. All Muslims are saddened by the Khilafat issue. Hindus are also saddened by the Muslims' grief. Where can we see no end in sight, and mourning is observed in the neighborhood?
How can India celebrate reconciliation?
Celebrating reconciliation at this time is a false statement and a papad for Hindus and Muslims.
Dr. M.S. Ansari, Sadar; Lala Shankarlal, Secretary, Home Rule League; Tajuddin, Editor; Taj Jabal Pur; Professor Indra, Editor; Vijay, Secretaries, Opposition Happiness Committee, Delhi
ANTIPEACE
CELEBRATION PUBLICITY BOARD, DELHI.

khilafat_posters_p006.translated_text:
﻿________________

Mahatma Gandhi's order, Maulana Abdul Bari's fatwa
and
the decision of the Joint Conference of Hindus and Muslims
is that no Indian should celebrate the victory of Mulh, which will be celebrated on December 13, 14, 15, and 16, 1616.

There is no peace anywhere!
Then why should we celebrate the victory of Mulh? Is there peace in Asia?
Persia, Egypt, Turkey—these are living proof of peace. All Muslims are saddened by the issue of the Caliphate. Hindus also feel sad at the sorrow of Muslims. Reconciliation is nowhere in sight, and mourning is observed in the neighborhood.
How can India celebrate the joy of reconciliation?
Celebrating the joy of reconciliation is a lie and a sin for Hindus and Muslims at this time.
Dr. M.S. Ansari, Sadar, Lala Shankarlal, Secretary, Home Rule League, Tajuddin, Editor, Taj Jabal Pur, Professor Indra, Editor, Vijay, Secretaries, Opposition Khushi Committee, Delhi.
ANTIPEACE
CELEBRATION PUBLICITY BOARD, DELHI.
Printed at J. & Sons and C.A. Press, Delhi, under the management of Lala Laxmi Narayana.
CS CamScanner
